actual_runtime_chain: play_mujoco_trajectory.py -> build_dual_camera_scene(...) or raw MJCF in legacy mode
load_chain.key_observation: default cjjarm_sim runtime loads a generated MJCF scene built from the base home MJCF plus camera and target bodies; URDF is still used for kinematics and wrist camera mount extraction; legacy cjjarm_sim falls back to loading the URDF directly.
